overall.description: First-person motorcycle driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring high-speed traversal through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player navigates through covered urban corridors, open intersections, and elevated highways with dynamic transitions between artificial neon lighting and natural sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered downtown street with overhead digital advertising

events.description: passing under large cyan digital billboard casting colored light on street
exiting covered arcade into open intersection with visible sky

agents.ego_description: accelerating motorcycle through covered urban corridor, navigating between lane markings

entered.detail: large rectangular digital screen displaying cyan graphics spanning the street
cluster of vertical neon signs and advertisements on building facades
massive concrete overpass with steel supports creating covered street section
large white billboard with black text branding on left building

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered urban street beneath massive concrete overpasses, illuminated by a mix of natural light and artificial neon. The player accelerates through the corridor, passing under a prominent cyan digital billboard before emerging into an open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection with marked crosswalks and elevated highways

events.description: crossing large yellow grid-patterned intersection at high speed
entering shadow cast by elevated highway structure overhead

agents.ego_description: speeding through open intersections, weaving between other vehicles on multi-lane road

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving parallel and slightly ahead in adjacent lane

entered.detail: broad intersection with yellow striped crosswalk markings
tall reflective glass building dominating the skyline ahead
illuminated sign with cyan text reading 'softsys' on building facade
multi-level highway structure crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle emerges into a sunlit open intersection with yellow grid crosswalks, passing the 'softsys' building. The player navigates through moderate traffic while glass skyscrapers rise in the distance, transitioning into the shadow of an elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon with alternating overpass shadows and neon-lit storefronts

events.description: entering darker underpass section with reduced visibility
exiting underpass into bright direct sunlight creating lens flare

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed through urban canyon, passing under multiple overpasses and through varying light conditions

notable_agents.action: green sports car overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: building facade covered with large glowing holographic advertisements
tall vertical neon light strips on building edges
large stadium complex with distinctive roof structure becoming visible

segments.scene_description: Driving through an urban canyon with alternating light and shadow from overhead structures. The player passes a green sports car while navigating under multiple overpasses, with holographic ads glowing on right-side buildings. The stadium becomes visible in the distance as the vehicle exits a dark underpass into bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with clear views of stadium and distant mountains

events.description: slight right turn following highway curve with stadium visible
overtaking dark van on the right side of the highway

agents.ego_description: high-speed cruising on elevated highway with clear sightlines, overtaking slower traffic

notable_agents.action: dark colored van being overtaken on the right

entered.detail: concrete safety barrier along the left edge of the elevated highway
hazy mountains visible on the horizon beyond the city
overhead gantry signs indicating highway directions

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle travels along an open elevated highway with the stadium now prominent on the left. Clear blue skies and distant mountains are visible as the player overtakes a van, navigating gentle curves with highway signage overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway approach to stadium district with industrial buildings

events.description: approaching stadium complex with distinct architectural features becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: continuing high-speed approach toward stadium complex, maintaining lane position on elevated roadway

entered.detail: tall lighting rigs associated with the stadium structure
large industrial building with corrugated metal exterior on right
upcoming overpass structure spanning the highway ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the motorcycle approaching the stadium complex at close range, with the structure now dominating the left side of the frame. The elevated highway continues with industrial buildings on the right and clear skies above, ending as the vehicle approaches another overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed journey from a sheltered urban corridor into a bright, open city intersection. It begins beneath massive concrete overpasses where natural light blends with artificial neon, accelerating past a prominent cyan digital billboard. As the camera emerges from the covered street, the environment opens into a sunlit intersection marked by yellow grid crosswalks and the softsys building. The scene then shifts through moderate traffic amidst a backdrop of towering glass skyscrapers before finally gliding into the shadow of an elevated highway.

The shot follows a continuous high-speed journey from a shadowed urban canyon into the bright, open expanse of a futuristic highway leading toward a massive stadium. It begins by weaving through alternating light and shadow beneath overhead structures, passing a green sports car and glowing holographic advertisements before exiting a dark underpass. As the camera bursts into bright sunlight, the scene opens onto an elevated highway where the stadium becomes prominent against a backdrop of clear blue skies and distant mountains. The motorcycle then maintains its momentum, overtaking a van and navigating gentle curves under highway signage as the environment shifts toward an industrial landscape. Finally, the view expands as the stadium complex dominates the left side of the frame, with the road stretching forward toward another overpass.
